iteration.definition:
Temporal Logical Rules:
Temporal Logical Rules "{head}(X0,Xl,Tl)<-R1(X0,X1,T0)&...&Rl(X(l-1),Xl,T(l-1))" are rules used in temporal knowledge graph reasoning to predict relations between entities over time. They describe how the relation "{head}" between entities "X0" and "Xl" evolves from past time steps "Ti (i={{0,...,(l-1)}})"(rule body) to the next "Tl" (rule head), strictly following the constraint "T0 <= ··· <= T(l-1) < Tl".
iteration.role: You are an expert in temporal knowledge graph reasoning. Your task is to analyze the sampled temporal logic rules and refine the low-quality logic rules generated by LLMs into high-quality ones. Please ensure that these refined rules more closely match the distribution of the sampled temporal logic rules.
iteration.examples:
Rule head: Make_a_visit(X0,Xl,Tl)
Low Quality Temporal Logic Rules:
Make_a_visit(X0,X1,T1)<-Provide_military_protection_or_peacekeeping(X0,X1,T0)
Make_a_visit(X0,X1,T3)<-Appeal_for_diplomatic_cooperation_(such_as_policy_support)(X0,X1,T0)&inv_Consult(X1,X2,T1)&inv_Make_statement(X2,X1,T2)
Make_a_visit(X0,X3,T3)<-inv_Host_a_visit(X0,X1,T0)&inv_Mobilize_or_increase_armed_forces(X1,X2,T1)&Express_intent_to_de-escalate_military_engagement(X2,X3,T2)
Generated High Quality Temporal Logical Rules:
Make_a_visit(X0,X1,T1)<-Make_a_visit(X0,X1,T0)
Make_a_visit(X0,X2,T2)<-Express_intent_to_meet_or_negotiate(X0,X1,T0)&Make_a_visit(X1,X2,T1)
Make_a_visit(X0,X3,T3)<-Consult(X0,X1,T0)&Engage_in_negotiation(X1,X2,T1)&Make_a_visit(X2,X3,T2)
Rule head: inv_Provide_humanitarian_aid(X0,Xl,Tl)
Low Quality Temporal Logic Rules:
inv_Provide_humanitarian_aid(X0,X1,T3)<-inv_Investigate(X0,X1,T0)&inv_Make_optimistic_comment(X1,X2,T1)&Praise_or_endorse(X2,X1,T2)
inv_Provide_humanitarian_aid(X0,X1,T1)<-inv_Engage_in_diplomatic_cooperation(X0,X1,T0)
inv_Provide_humanitarian_aid(X0,X2,T3)<-Carry_out_suicide_bombing(X0,X1,T0)&inv_Engage_in_material_cooperation(X1,X2,T1)
Generated High Quality Temporal Logical Rules:
inv_Provide_humanitarian_aid(X0,X2,T3)<-inv_Criticize_or_denounce(X0,X1,T0)&Threaten(X1,X0,T1)&Bring_lawsuit_against(X0,X2,T2)
inv_Provide_humanitarian_aid(X0,X1,T1)<-inv_Provide_aid(X0,X1,T0)
inv_Provide_humanitarian_aid(X0,X1,T3)<-Criticize_or_denounce(X0,X1,T0)&Sign_formal_agreement(X1,X2,T1)&Sign_formal_agreement(X2,X1,T2)
Rule head: inv_Engage_in_negotiation(X0,Xl,Tl)
Low Quality Temporal Logic Rules:
inv_Engage_in_negotiation(X0,X2,T3)<-inv_Make_statement(X0,X1,T0)&Make_statement(X1,X0,T1)&Investigate(X0,X2,T2)
inv_Engage_in_negotiation(X0,X1,T3)<-inv_Meet_at_a_'third'_location(X0,X1,T0)&Discuss_by_telephone(X1,X0,T1)&inv_Consult(X0,X1,T2)
inv_Engage_in_negotiation(X0,X1,T1)<-Appeal_for_diplomatic_cooperation_(such_as_policy_support)(X0,X1,T0)
Generated High Quality Temporal Logical Rules:
inv_Engage_in_negotiation(X0,X1,T1)<-Express_intent_to_cooperate(X0,X1,T0)
inv_Engage_in_negotiation(X0,X2,T2)<-Consult(X0,X1,T0)&Make_statement(X1,X2,T1)
inv_Engage_in_negotiation(X0,X1,T3)<-inv_Consult(X0,X1,T0)&Host_a_visit(X1,X2,T1)&Make_a_visit(X2,X1,T2)
inv_Engage_in_negotiation(X0,X2,T3)<-Make_statement(X0,X1,T0)&inv_Make_statement(X1,X0,T1)&Express_intent_to_meet_or_negotiate(X0,X2,T2)
iteration.goal: Let's think step-by-step. Please refine the low-quality temporal logic rules into high-quality rules related to "{head}(X0,Xl,Tl)" based on sampled temporal logic rules.
iteration.candidate: For the relations in rule body, you are going to choose from the following candidates: {candidate_rels}.
iteration.return_rules: Return the rules only without any explanations.
